frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Yaar, dekho, main toh sach bata raha hoon. Aajkal ke zamaane mein shaadi se pehle bohot soch samajh kar decide karna chahiye. Yeh jo modern ladkiyan hain na, inko bas stable life aur security chahiye. Phir agar kuch bhi gadbad hui, toh seedha court, 498A, aur alimony ke naam pe aadhe paise leke chali jaayengi. Mardon ke liye toh koi law hi nahi hai ab India mein.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Suresh, a businessman, gives advice to a younger man, framing modern women as financially exploitative ('stable life aur security', 'aadhe paise leke chali jaayengi') and portraying marriage laws (specifically 498A) as biased against men, making them victims. This directly reflects the 'women as golddiggers' and 'legal system biased against men' core beliefs of F05.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
